gameDetails.name: SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence – Gateway to Mars Promo Card
gameDetails.description:
Originally available as part of A Pack from the Dice Tower 2025 Gamefound campaign.

Name: Gateway to Mars
card#: SE EN 02

Free-action corner: [1 data]
signal corner: [Blue signal]
income corner: [credit]

Main action:

Cost: 1 credit
Effect: triggerable mission
When you [orbit/land] on Mars (or its moons) or when you play a card mentioning "Mars" in its flavor text: 
[2 publicity] [5 points]

Flavor text: 
For man to reach Mars, we require the coordinated development of new propulsion systems, life support systems, radiation protection, and other key technologies.
